body.title: Add get_milieu_state() tool returning current affective state
body.result: get_milieu_state() tool added to metrics.py — returns valence/arousal/dominance with per-dim gradients, dominant emotion label (VAD→label helper), and session character. 9 tests. commit 2a02d41.
body.description: Create callable tool returning current valence, arousal, and dominant emotion from the milieu system. Igor currently has no direct read on his own emotional register. Add to tools/metrics.py: call self._igor.milieu.get_state() or equivalent and return formatted snapshot.
